description:
**Problem**
Plan requires priority ordering and overload shedding to protect local mutations from replication storms.

**Context**
- REALTIME_PLAN.md §0.19 (overload shedding, internal backpressure defaults)
- Priority: local IPC > replication ingest > WANT servicing > checkpoint

**Design**
- Add `AdmissionController` to src/daemon/admission.rs
- Track inflight counts: ipc_mutations, repl_ingest_bytes, repl_ingest_events
- Enforce limits: MAX_IPC_INFLIGHT_MUTATIONS (1024), MAX_REPL_INGEST_QUEUE_BYTES (32 MiB), MAX_REPL_INGEST_QUEUE_EVENTS (50k)
- When overloaded: shed replication first, then IPC
- Return ERROR(code="overloaded") with retry_after_ms

**Acceptance**
- [ ] AdmissionController tracks inflight by priority class
- [ ] Replication shed before IPC mutations
- [ ] Limits enforced with ERROR(code="overloaded")
- [ ] Tests verify shedding order

**Files:** src/daemon/admission.rs (new), src/daemon/core.rs, src/daemon/repl/session.rs
title: Phase 5: AdmissionController + overload shedding

description:
**Problem**
WAL implementation (~8,300 lines) lives in \`beads-rs/src/daemon/wal/\` while WAL contracts + memory index already live in \`beads-daemon-core/src/wal/\`. The subsystem spans two locations — you can't reason about it in one place. The impl is trapped inside beads-rs, blocking daemon runtime extraction.

**Design**
Move WAL impl into \`beads-daemon-core/src/wal/\` alongside existing contracts. Feature-gate heavy deps.

Move map:
- \`beads-rs/src/daemon/wal/event_wal.rs\` → \`beads-daemon-core/src/wal/event_wal.rs\`
- \`beads-rs/src/daemon/wal/frame.rs\` → merge with existing daemon-core frame.rs
- \`beads-rs/src/daemon/wal/fsck.rs\` → \`beads-daemon-core/src/wal/fsck.rs\`
- \`beads-rs/src/daemon/wal/index.rs\` → \`beads-daemon-core/src/wal/sqlite_index.rs\`
- \`beads-rs/src/daemon/wal/memory_wal.rs\` → \`beads-daemon-core/src/wal/memory_wal.rs\`
- \`beads-rs/src/daemon/wal/record.rs\` → \`beads-daemon-core/src/wal/record.rs\`
- \`beads-rs/src/daemon/wal/replay.rs\` → \`beads-daemon-core/src/wal/replay.rs\`
- \`beads-rs/src/daemon/wal/seams.rs\` → \`beads-daemon-core/src/wal/seams.rs\`
- \`beads-rs/src/daemon/wal/segment.rs\` → \`beads-daemon-core/src/wal/segment.rs\`

Feature gating:
\`\`\`toml
[features]
default = []
wal-sqlite = ["dep:rusqlite"]
wal-fs = ["dep:rand"]
test-harness = ["uuid"]

[dependencies]
rusqlite = { version = "0.31", optional = true }
rand = { version = "0.9", optional = true }
\`\`\`

Default features = contracts + memory index only. \`wal-sqlite\` + \`wal-fs\` for full impl. Model/fuzz consumers skip rusqlite.

Compat shim: \`beads-rs/src/daemon/wal/mod.rs\` becomes \`pub use beads_daemon_core::wal::*;\`

**Acceptance**
- [ ] All WAL impl files moved to \`beads-daemon-core/src/wal/\`
- [ ] Compiles with default features (contracts + memory index only)
- [ ] Compiles with \`wal-sqlite\` + \`wal-fs\` (full impl)
- [ ] beads-rs depends on beads-daemon-core with sqlite+fs features enabled
- [ ] Compat shim preserves existing \`crate::daemon::wal::*\` import paths
- [ ] WAL unit tests pass
- [ ] \`cargo check --workspace\` passes
- [ ] \`cargo test --workspace\` passes
- [ ] \`just dylint\` passes

**Files:** \`crates/beads-daemon-core/src/wal/\` (expand), \`crates/beads-daemon-core/Cargo.toml\`, \`crates/beads-rs/src/daemon/wal/\` (becomes shim), \`crates/beads-rs/Cargo.toml\`
title: Absorb WAL implementation into beads-daemon-core (feature-gated)

description: tests/integration/daemon/admin.rs currently shells out to  for init/create/admin status/metrics/etc. These are daemon-level tests and can use IpcClient + Request::* directly. Keep CLI JSON shape tests in tests/integration/cli instead. Should reduce process spawn overhead and runtime.
title: Daemon admin tests use bd CLI; move to IPC for speed
